title: trifolium strictum
intro: Trifolium strictum, also known as strict clover, is a perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been found to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Trifolium strictum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and capsules, making it accessible for those looking to incorporate its benefits into their wellness routine.
